name: Max Miller
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $964,930 for Max Miller in U.S. House, OH-07. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $964,930.
